bool GVNPass::propagateEquality(Value *LHS, Value *RHS,
                                const BasicBlockEdge &Root,
                                bool DominatesByEdge) {
  SmallVector<std::pair<Value*, Value*>, 4> Worklist;
  Worklist.push_back(std::make_pair(LHS, RHS));
  bool Changed = false;
  // For speed, compute a conservative fast approximation to
  // DT->dominates(Root, Root.getEnd());
  const bool RootDominatesEnd = isOnlyReachableViaThisEdge(Root, DT);

  while (!Worklist.empty()) {
    std::pair<Value*, Value*> Item = Worklist.pop_back_val();
    LHS = Item.first; RHS = Item.second;

    if (LHS == RHS)
      continue;
    assert(LHS->getType() == RHS->getType() && "Equality but unequal types!");

    // Don't try to propagate equalities between constants.
    if (isa<Constant>(LHS) && isa<Constant>(RHS))
      continue;

    // Prefer a constant on the right-hand side, or an Argument if no constants.
    if (isa<Constant>(LHS) || (isa<Argument>(LHS) && !isa<Constant>(RHS)))
      std::swap(LHS, RHS);
    assert((isa<Argument>(LHS) || isa<Instruction>(LHS)) && "Unexpected value!");
    const DataLayout &DL =

bool GVNPass::replaceOperandsForInBlockEquality(Instruction *Instr) const {
  bool Changed = false;
  const DataLayout &DL = Instr->getDataLayout();
  for (unsigned OpNum = 0; OpNum < Instr->getNumOperands(); ++OpNum) {
    Value *Operand = Instr->getOperand(OpNum);
    auto It = ReplaceOperandsWithMap.find(Operand);
    if (It != ReplaceOperandsWithMap.end()) {
      Value *Replacement = It->second;
      // Check if it's safe to replace pointer operands.
      if (Operand->getType()->isPointerTy() &&
          !canReplacePointersInUseIfEqual(Instr->getOperandUse(OpNum),
                                          Replacement, DL))
        continue;
      LLVM_DEBUG(dbgs() << "GVN replacing: " << *Operand << " with "
                        << *Replacement << " in instruction " << *Instr << '\n');
      Instr->setOperand(OpNum, Replacement);
      Changed = true;
    }
  }
  return Changed;
}
